need to give some insight. Moksha is nothing but freedom of the soul from this cycle of repeated birth and death.
The soul is eternal but it is caught up in this material world, accepting material bodies, punarapi janma, punarapi marna
and each life going through janma, mrityu, jara, vyadi, birth, death, old age and disease and this is happening life after life.
So what is moksha? Moksha is the soul extricates from this cycle of birth and death and goes back to its original home, the kingdom of God
which is also called mukti, moksha or going back to our original home, the kingdom of God.
